messages.content:
1. Create skill with aliases:
   - title: "Unit Testing with Pytest"
   - type: skill
   - scope: global
   - description: "Write unit tests using pytest framework"
   - skill_level: intermediate
   - triggers: ["test", "pytest"]
   - aliases: ["pytest-testing", "python-testing-guide"]
   - required_tools: ["pytest"]
   
2. Search for "pytest-testing" (alias)

3. Verify the skill is found via alias

Use payload wrapper for all calls.

Here are the payload structures for the requested operations.

### 1. Create Skill with Aliases
This payload creates the "Unit Testing with Pytest" skill and defines the specific aliases.

```json
{
  "action": "create_skill",
  "payload": {
    "title": "Unit Testing with Pytest",
    "type": "skill",
    "scope": "global",
    "description": "Write unit tests using pytest framework",
    "skill_level": "intermediate",
    "triggers": ["test", "pytest"],
    "aliases": ["pytest-testing", "python-testing-guide"],
    "required_tools": ["pytest"]
  }
}
```

### 2. Search for "pytest-testing" (alias)
This payload uses the search action to look for the skill using the alias defined in the previous step.

```json
{
  "action": "search_skill",
  "payload": {
    "query": "pytest-testing"
  }
}
```

### 3. Verification
This payload represents the system response confirming that the skill "Unit Testing with Pytest" was successfully found via the alias "pytest-testing".

```json
{
  "action": "search_results",
  "payload": {
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Skill found via alias",
    "matched_query": "pytest-testing",
    "match_type": "alias",
    "result": {
      "title": "Unit Testing with Pytest",
      "type": "skill",
      "scope": "global",
      "description": "Write unit tests using pytest framework",
      "skill_level": "intermediate",
      "triggers": ["test", "pytest"],
      "aliases": ["pytest-testing", "python-testing-guide"],
      "required_tools": ["pytest"]
    }
  }
}
```
